interfaces.name: getHomePageContent
interfaces.description: Get homepage hero text, focus areas, and primary CTAs for navigation to core flows.

interfaces.name: getFeaturedCaseStudies
interfaces.description: Get a list of featured case studies for use on the homepage or case studies page.

parameters.name: maxItems
parameters.description: Maximum number of featured case studies to return.

interfaces.name: getRecentBlogPosts
interfaces.description: Get most recent published blog posts for homepage and blog teaser sections.

parameters.name: maxItems
parameters.description: Maximum number of posts to return.

interfaces.name: getConsultationFormOptions
interfaces.description: Get selectable options needed to render the Book Consultation form (service types, durations, industries, budget ranges).

interfaces.name: getConsultationPrefill
interfaces.description: Get suggested default values for the Book Consultation form when coming from another context (offering detail, assessment results, event, etc.).

parameters.name: sourceReferenceId
parameters.description: ID of the source entity (e.g., ConsultingOffering id, AIReadinessAssessmentSession id, Event id) when applicable.

offeringId.description: If prefill came from a specific ConsultingOffering.

scheduledStartSuggestion.description: ISO 8601 datetime suggestion if relevant, e.g., from event or calendar.

interfaces.name: submitConsultationBooking
interfaces.description: Submit the Book Consultation form and create a consultation booking request.

parameters.name: scheduledStart
parameters.description: Requested start datetime in ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: offeringId
parameters.description: Linked ConsultingOffering id, if the consultation is tied to a specific offering.

parameters.name: sourceReferenceId
parameters.description: ID of the originating entity for tracking attribution.

interfaces.name: getConsultingPackageFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for Plans & Packages (client size segments, budget ranges, offering types).

interfaces.name: searchConsultingOfferings
interfaces.description: Search consulting offerings/packages for the Plans & Packages page using filters such as company size, budget, and workshop inclusion.

interfaces.name: getOfferingDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details of a specific consulting offering for the Offering Detail page.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: URL slug of the offering. Either 'slug' or 'offeringId' must be provided.

parameters.name: offeringId
parameters.description: ID of the offering when not using slug.

interfaces.name: getProposalRequestPrefill
interfaces.description: Get pre-filled values for the Proposal Request form based on a selected offering and/or project estimate.

parameters.name: offeringId
parameters.description: ConsultingOffering id when coming from a package or offering detail page.

parameters.name: estimateId
parameters.description: ProjectEstimate id when coming from the project estimator.

suggestedDesiredStartDate.description: Suggested project start date (e.g., first day of a month, ISO 8601 date).

interfaces.name: submitProposalRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a proposal request for a consulting offering and/or a configured project estimate.

parameters.name: offeringName
parameters.description: Used when no internal offering id exists, or to override display name.

parameters.name: estimateId
parameters.description: Linked ProjectEstimate id when coming from the project estimator.

parameters.name: desiredStartDate
parameters.description: Desired project start date; can be stored as first day of requested month (ISO 8601 date).

interfaces.name: getCaseStudyFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Case Studies page (industries, years, ROI thresholds, duration categories).

interfaces.name: searchCaseStudies
interfaces.description: Search and filter case studies for the Case Studies page.

interfaces.name: getContentDetail
interfaces.description: Get full content for a single case study or blog post, including saved status for reading list/queue.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: URL slug identifying the content. Either 'slug' or 'contentId' must be provided.

parameters.name: contentId
parameters.description: Internal content id when not using slug.

interfaces.name: saveCaseStudyToReadingList
interfaces.description: Add a case study to the user's Reading List (Saved Items).

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Optional personal note to save with this item.

interfaces.name: saveBlogPostToReadingQueue
interfaces.description: Add a blog post to the user's Reading Queue (Saved Articles).

interfaces.name: getSavedItems
interfaces.description: Get saved items for the Reading List (case studies) or Reading Queue (blog posts).

parameters.name: listType
parameters.description: Either 'reading_list' for case studies or 'reading_queue' for blog posts.

interfaces.name: removeSavedItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the Reading List or Reading Queue.

interfaces.name: getAIReadinessQuestions
interfaces.description: Get all active AI Readiness Assessment questions with their possible answer options for the assessment page.

interfaces.name: submitAIReadinessAssessment
interfaces.description: Submit selected answers for the AI Readiness Assessment, compute readiness level, and determine a recommended service.

interfaces.name: getEventFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Events & Webinars page (date ranges, topic categories, time-of-day presets).

interfaces.name: searchEvents
interfaces.description: Search and filter events/webinars by date range, topic, and time of day.

parameters.name: timeOfDayFrom
parameters.description: Earliest start time in HH:MM, e.g., '11:00'.

parameters.name: timeOfDayTo
parameters.description: Latest start time in HH:MM, e.g., '15:00'.

interfaces.name: getEventDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a single event or webinar, including date, time, timezone, and description.

interfaces.name: submitEventRegistration
interfaces.description: Submit an on-site registration for a specific event/webinar.

interfaces.name: getEstimatorConfigOptions
interfaces.description: Get configuration options for the Project Estimator page (industries, scopes, modules, budget presets).

interfaces.name: createProjectEstimate
interfaces.description: Create and calculate an AI project estimate based on industry, scope, modules, team size, timeline, and budget range.

interfaces.name: getBlogFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Blog / Insights page (date ranges, topic categories, sort options).

interfaces.name: searchBlogPosts
interfaces.description: Search and filter blog posts by keyword, date range, topic, and maximum read time.

parameters.name: maxReadTimeMinutes
parameters.description: Filter posts by maximum estimated read time.

interfaces.name: getTrainingProgramFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for Training Programs (delivery format, region, capacity ranges, budget ranges, live sessions).

interfaces.name: searchTrainingPrograms
interfaces.description: Search and filter training programs by delivery format, region, capacity, budget, and minimum live sessions.

interfaces.name: getTrainingProgramDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details of a specific training program for the Training Detail page.

interfaces.name: submitTrainingBookingRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a booking/interest request for a specific training program.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get structured content for the About page (mission, values, team overview, industries served, certifications).

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a general contact form with questions or requests.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get privacy policy content describing data collection and usage across forms and tracking.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 date the policy was last updated.

helperFunctions.name: _resolveSlugToId
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to resolve content, offering, event, or training slugs to their underlying ids for storage lookups.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateConsultationEndTime
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute scheduledEnd based on scheduledStart and durationMinutes when creating ConsultationBooking records.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateSavedItemsStore
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the single-user SavedItem collection, stored in local persistence.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateAIReadinessScoreAndLevel
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to sum option scores, derive overall readinessLevel, and populate AIReadinessAssessmentSession.overallScore.

helperFunctions.name: _determineRecommendedOffering
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to map AI readiness results to a recommended ConsultingOffering id.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateEstimateRange
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute estimatedCostMin and estimatedCostMax for ProjectEstimate based on inputs.

helperFunctions.name: _getCurrentDateTimeUtc
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to provide current UTC timestamp for createdAt fields across entities.
